info.description: Large banner at the top of a page: headline, optional rotating words, background image or video, and buttons.

eyebrow.description: Small label above the headline, e.g. 'Powerlaw Corp. · Nasdaq: PWRL'.

heading.description: Main headline. On the home page the rotating words below are used instead.

subheading.description: Supporting line shown under the headline.

body.description: Paragraph(s) of intro copy. Separate paragraphs with a blank line.

headlineSlides.description: Home hero only: full headline phrases shown one at a time (e.g. 'Powerlaw Corp.', 'Nasdaq: PWRL'). One phrase per row.

headlinePrefix.description: Home hero only: fixed text that stays on screen while the words after it rotate, e.g. 'Only for'.

headlineSuffixes.description: Home hero only: the rotating words after the prefix (e.g. 'big thinkers.', 'Mars seekers.', 'everyone.'). One per row.

rotatingPhrases.description: Legacy field — leave empty. Use Headline slides / suffixes instead.

compact.description: Use a shorter hero band (used on Investor Relations and Contact).

backgroundImage.description: Background image behind the hero (used if no background video is set).

backgroundVideo.description: Full-screen looping background video. Takes priority over the background image.
